transactions.desc: Raquet was optioned to Triple-A Norfolk on Monday, Roch Kubatko of MASNSports.com reports.
The Pirates optioned Murdock to Triple-A Indianapolis prior to Sunday's 14-5 win over the Brewers.
The Pittsburgh Pirates traded RHP Cam Sanders to the Baltimore Orioles. The Orioles then optioned him to the minors.
The Astros optioned Santa to Triple-A Sugar Land on Monday, Chandler Rome of The Athletic reports.
The Orioles acquired Sanders from the Pirates on Monday in exchange for cash considerations, Roch Kubatko of MASNSports.com reports.
The Astros promoted Neyens from Single-A Fayetteville to High-A Asheville on Monday, Chandler Rome of The Athletic reports.
The Brewers optioned Stallings to Triple-A Nashville on Sunday.
The White Sox optioned Davis to Triple-A Charlotte following Sunday's 9-1 win over the Athletics.
The White Sox reinstated Richards from the bereavement list following Sunday's 9-1 win over the Athletics.
The Cardinals released Madris on Saturday.
Cijntje is expected to be promoted to Triple-A Memphis after the All-Star break, Rob Rains of StLSportsPage.com reports.
Walton was promoted to Double-A Akron on Sunday.
The Mets released Oliva on Saturday.
Ortiz was optioned to Triple-A Rochester after Sunday's 5-3 loss to the Yankees, Kyle Williams of TheBanner.com reports.
The Pirates optioned Kelly to Triple-A Indianapolis after Sunday's 14-5 win against the Brewers, Alex Stumpf of MLB.com reports.
The Nationals outrighted Hassell to Triple-A Rochester after he cleared waivers Sunday.
The Athletics claimed Walton off waivers from the Angels on Sunday.
The Blue Jays selected Van Eyk's contract from Triple-A Buffalo on Sunday.
The Blue Jays optioned Dallas to Triple-A Buffalo on Sunday.
The Rangers recalled Teodo from Triple-A Round Rock on Sunday.
The Diamondbacks recalled Bratt from Triple-A Reno to start Sunday's game against the Dodgers.
The Giants optioned Bivens to Triple-A Sacramento on Sunday, Alex Pavlovic of NBC Sports Bay Area reports.
The Giants reinstated Foley (shoulder) from the 60-day injured list Sunday, Alex Pavlovic of NBC Sports Bay Area reports.
The Red Sox activated Sogard (oblique) from the 10-day injured list and optioned him to Triple-A Worcester on Sunday.
The Mets recalled Thornton from Triple-A Syracuse ahead of his start against the Red Sox on Sunday.
The Marlins recalled Fulton from Triple-A Jacksonville on Sunday.
The Nationals designated Krook for assignment Sunday.
The Nationals recalled Ortiz from Triple-A Rochester on Sunday. He'll start at designated hitter and bat third in the series finale against the Yankees.
The Reds recalled Petty from Triple-A Louisville on Sunday.
The Houston Astros traded INF Braden Shewmake to the Milwaukee Brewers.
